status_definitions.planned: Required by the workflow but not yet located.
status_definitions.verified_available: The official location and document identity were checked.
status_definitions.captured: The original artifact, checksum, and capture metadata are stored.
status_definitions.blocked: Access, licensing, or another explicit dependency prevents capture.
status_definitions.excluded: Reviewed and intentionally outside the research-cycle boundary.
status_definitions.superseded: A newer captured version exists; the earlier version is retained.
